author: doll-agent
content: Added group_splitters.rs with 5 group-aware CV splitters: GroupKFold (greedy load-balanced), GroupShuffleSplit (deterministic seeded), LeaveOneGroupOut, LeavePGroupsOut (lexicographic combos), StratifiedGroupKFold (greedy class-balance). All take Array1<usize> group labels. 6 unit tests pass.
